description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rakudo-star:latest Docker image and runs a before_script that executes "zef update", then "zef install --depsonly --/test ." and finally "zef --/test install .". Define a single job named test in the default test stage that only runs on the master and dev branches and runs the command "prove -ve 'perl6 -Ilib'". No services, caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are specified.
